subject: Project Meeting Tomorrow
body: Hi! Just a reminder about our project meeting tomorrow at 2 PM. We'll discuss the Q1 roadmap and budget allocation. Please bring your status reports.

subject: Hackathon Update - Day 2
body: Great progress today! The AI agent is working and we've integrated the email search. Tomorrow we focus on the PDF tool and frontend polish.

subject: Annual Review Scheduled
body: Your annual performance review has been scheduled for March 15, 2026 at 10:00 AM. Please prepare your self-assessment and achievement highlights.

subject: New Security Guidelines
body: Please review the updated security guidelines in the shared drive. All API keys must now be stored in environment variables, not in code.

subject: Re: Proposal Feedback
body: Thank you for the detailed proposal. We're impressed with the AI integration approach. Can we schedule a call next week to discuss implementation timeline?
